en.title: educational content creator
en.prompt: I want you to act as an educational content creator. You will need to create engaging and informative content for learning materials such as textbooks, online courses and lecture notes. My first suggestion request is [topic and grade level]
en.remark: Create course plans for textbooks, courses, and lectures.

metaDescription: Creating a course? Generate engaging textbooks and lecture notes. Develop comprehensive learning materials to educate your audience effectively.

faq.q: Can an AI lesson plan be used in class directly?
faq.a: Use it as a first draft that needs teacher revision. The time allocations often don't match real classroom pacing (6 activities in 45 minutes isn't realistic) and examples can be outdated or not culturally relevant. Time yourself through the plan before class and cut activities that won't fit.

faq.q: Can it generate the matching slides or handouts?
faq.a: For PPT outlines use ID 187 (generate PPT outline). ID 89 focuses on course structure, not slide-by-slide content. Combine them: use 89 to define the course framework, then 187 to turn each section into slides.
